anchors.title: International Agricultural Show (Final Day)
zoneImpact: Périphérique Sud (Porte de Brancion ↔ Porte de la Plaine)

anchors.title: RoissyBus Service Discontinuation
anchors.notes: Permanent cessation of RoissyBus expected to shift demand toward taxis/VTC around Opéra pickup zones.

anchors.title: Paris Fashion Week (Womenswear FW 26/27) Start
anchors.notes: Distributed luxury transit circuit across central/west arrondissements through March 10.

anchors.title: Indochine — Arena Tour (Residency date)
anchors.notes: High evening arrivals and late-night egress; residency continues on March 4, 6, and 7.

anchors.title: PSG vs AS Monaco (Ligue 1)
anchors.notes: Stadium pulse expected with concentrated arrivals pre-match and egress post-match.

anchors.title: HOKA Semi de Paris (Half Marathon)
anchors.notes: Major arterial closures and east-side fragmentation; expect reroutes and congestion spillover.

anchors.title: JEC World (Composites) — Opening window
anchors.notes: Industrial trade fair (Mar 10–12) driving morning arrivals and airport transfers along A1/A104.

anchors.title: PSG vs Chelsea (Champions League)
anchors.notes: International match with higher VIP and premium VTC demand.

anchors.title: Salon des Seniors (Opening)
anchors.notes: Public fair (Mar 11–14) likely increasing taxi/VTC door-to-door trips around the venue.

anchors.title: Salon Mondial du Tourisme + Destinations Nature (Start)
anchors.notes: Concurrent public fairs (Mar 12–15) sustaining elevated arrivals and evening egress.

anchors.title: France vs England (Six Nations Final)
anchors.notes: 80,000+ crowd with post-match saturation window starting around 22:15.

anchors.title: Paris Manga & Sci-Fi Show (Day 1)
anchors.notes: High-volume public event (Mar 14–15) affecting A1 and access to Villepinte.

anchors.title: Rosalía — Concert date
anchors.notes: International concert with strong VTC demand; additional date on March 20.

anchors.title: Workspace Expo / Eurocoat (Start)
anchors.notes: Professional fairs (Mar 24–26), including a late opening (nocturne) on Mar 25.

anchors.title: SITEM (Museums & Culture) (Start)
anchors.notes: B2B cultural fair (Mar 25–26) in a central high-friction access zone.

anchors.title: Artus — La Défense Arena (Show date)
anchors.notes: Very large indoor show (Mar 27–28) creating major ingress/egress pressure at La Défense.

anchors.title: Foire du Trône (Opening)
anchors.notes: Major funfair starting Mar 27 with sustained evening traffic pressure near eastern gates.

anchors.title: Senegal vs Peru (International match)
anchors.notes: High-volume diaspora crowd expected; strong north corridor congestion risk.

anchors.title: Global Industrie 2026 (Start)
anchors.notes: Large industrial fair (Mar 30–Apr 2) driving sustained professional mobility and airport transfers.
